## 🎯 **QUICK COMMANDS**

**Check progress:**
```bash
node webflow/verify-page-sections.js progress
```

**Mark section verified:**
```bash
node webflow/verify-page-sections.js verify /marketplace hero
```

**Mark page complete:**
```bash
node webflow/verify-page-sections.js verify-page /marketplace
```

**List all pages:**
```bash
node webflow/verify-page-sections.js list
```

---

## 📝 **NOTES**

- This checklist auto-updates based on `page-verification-status.json`
- Mark sections as verified as you complete them
- Use the dashboard (`ROLLOUT_DASHBOARD.html`) for visual tracking
- Start with service pages, then core pages, then niche pages

---
